headline: American Electric Power Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings

headline: AEP Names Andy Gurgol Vice President of Investor Relations
summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio - American Electric Power has named Andy Gurgol vice president of Investor Relations, effective May 9. He will succeed Darcy Reese, who will retire at the end of the year. Gurgol will...
